landing.tagline: Your gateway to next-generation architecture. Seamlessly fused for maximum velocity.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Powered by Vite and FastAPI for incredible speed.

secure.title: Secure Auth
secure.desc: JWT-based authentication with OAuth support built-in.

modern.title: Modern UI
modern.desc: Sleek glassmorphism design system ready to go.

auth.login_subtitle: Resume your session. Enter the stream.
auth.register_subtitle: Join the next generation. Build your future.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Secure your account again. Choose a new key.
auth.reset_success: Password reset successful. Redirecting to login...
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Lost your key? Initiate recovery protocol.
auth.recovery_sent: We have sent a password recovery instruction to
auth.recovery_helper: We'll send you a link to reset your password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.hover_to_view: Hover to view key. Keep it secret.
dashboard.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to sever the connection? This action cannot be undone.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.subtitle: The signal has reached a dead end.
404.description: The frequency you are looking for does not exist in this sector or has been moved to a different coordinate.

500.title: System Failure
500.subtitle: A critical error has occurred in the core.
500.description: Our systems encountered an internal anomaly. We are working to restore the high-velocity architecture.

403.title: Access Denied
403.subtitle: Your clearance level is insufficient.
403.description: This frequency is restricted. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.subtitle: Protocol requires authentication.
401.description: Your transmission lacks the necessary credentials. Please log in to resume the stream.

default.title: Signal Interference
default.subtitle: An unexpected anomaly has occurred.
default.description: We've encountered a temporary disruption. Please try to re-establish the connection.
